brief.speaker: oldrich
brief.text: Every pour. Every coin. A year of it. Look at the book before you ask me anything.

expected.sql: SELECT visit_id, patron_id, visit_date, tab_groschen FROM visits LIMIT 10

hints.text: Oldrich grunts. 'I asked for ten lines, not the whole year.'
Oldrich frowns. 'Not enough. Show me ten.'
Oldrich peers over your shoulder. 'You wrote that wrong. Try again. The table is called *visits*.'
Oldrich: 'Pick the columns you want, name the table, ten rows. That's all I asked.'

success.speaker: oldrich
success.text: Oldrich grunts. 'Now you've seen it. Ask me what you want.'
